_comment: RBA risk model: the contributor definitions. Each is a noisy-but-interesting observation that is NOT alerted on individually; the collector runs each query, applies the risk-factor multiplier, and publishes the resulting rows as risk events into dataSource.name='risk'. Each query ends in the standard risk-event columns projection. Use contains:anycase predicates (NOT regex with \s escapes) so the query survives JSON embedding in the collector workflow. base_score and MITRE tags are starter values; tune per environment. risk_object_type is 'user' or 'host'. The collector appends: | lookup mult=risk_multiplier from {{FACTOR_TABLE}} by factor_key =:anycase risk_object | let risk_score = base_score * (mult ? number(mult) : 1) | let <constant fields> | columns risk_object, risk_object_type, risk_score, base_score, mitre_tactic, mitre_technique, contributor, threat_object, threat_object_type, endpoint, risk_message | limit 1000

contributors.name: suspicious_powershell_flags
contributors.filter: dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.type='Process Creation' src.process.user=* src.process.name in:anycase ('powershell.exe','pwsh.exe') src.process.cmdline contains:anycase ('-nop','-enc','-encodedcommand','-w hidden','-windowstyle','frombase64string')
contributors.group: | group threat_object=any(src.process.cmdline), hits=count() by risk_object=src.process.user, endpoint=endpoint.name

contributors.name: ad_recon_burst
contributors.filter: dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.type='Process Creation' src.process.user=* src.process.name in:anycase ('whoami.exe','net.exe','net1.exe','nltest.exe','systeminfo.exe','tasklist.exe','quser.exe','arp.exe')
contributors.group: | group threat_object=any(src.process.cmdline), distinct_bins=estimate_distinct(src.process.name), hits=count() by risk_object=src.process.user, endpoint=endpoint.name | filter distinct_bins >= 3

contributors.name: lolbin_download
contributors.filter: dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.type='Process Creation' src.process.user=* src.process.name in:anycase ('certutil.exe','bitsadmin.exe','mshta.exe','regsvr32.exe','rundll32.exe') src.process.cmdline contains:anycase ('http://','https://','frombase64string')
contributors.group: | group threat_object=any(src.process.cmdline), hits=count() by risk_object=src.process.user, endpoint=endpoint.name

contributors.name: eventlog_clear
contributors.filter: dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.type='Process Creation' src.process.user=* src.process.cmdline contains:anycase ('wevtutil cl','clear-eventlog','clear-winevent')
contributors.group: | group threat_object=any(src.process.cmdline), hits=count() by risk_object=src.process.user, endpoint=endpoint.name

contributors.name: shadowcopy_delete
contributors.filter: dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.type='Process Creation' endpoint.name=* src.process.cmdline contains:anycase ('vssadmin delete shadows','wmic shadowcopy delete','-volumeshadowcopy')
contributors.group: | group threat_object=any(src.process.cmdline), hits=count() by risk_object=endpoint.name, endpoint=endpoint.name

contributors.name: credential_access_indicator
contributors.filter: dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.type='Process Creation' src.process.user=* src.process.cmdline contains:anycase ('mimikatz','sekurlsa','secretsdump','comsvcs.dll','lsass')
contributors.group: | group threat_object=any(src.process.cmdline), hits=count() by risk_object=src.process.user, endpoint=endpoint.name
